footer.mention: SMP Wood is a commercial brand operated by SMP France.

home.meta_title: SMP France – Wood pellets supplier for professionals
home.meta_desc: Wood pellets trading and distribution in France, Belgium, Switzerland and Europe. Solutions adapted for professionals.
home.hero_title: Trading and distribution of wood pellets for professionals in Europe
home.hero_subtitle: SMP France supports market players in the sourcing, structuring, and delivery of wood pellets, with an approach focused on reliability, volumes, and clear offers.
home.metrics_zones: Operations in France, Belgium, and Switzerland – European capacity
home.trust_text: We operate alongside distribution networks, merchants, and professional players in the sector, providing solutions tailored to their supply constraints.
home.about_title: A simple approach: offering reliable and actionable solutions
home.about_text_1: SMP France is specialized in the sourcing and distribution of wood pellets for professionals.
home.about_text_2: We work with a network of suppliers, prioritizing supplies from the French market to ensure better logistics control and flow regularity.
home.about_text_3: Additionally, we mobilize European sourcing solutions when this allows optimizing supply conditions depending on delivery zones.
home.about_text_4: Our role consists of building coherent offers, combining availability, product quality, logistical conditions, and clarity of information.
home.products_title: Wood pellets – formats adapted for professionals
home.products_text: We offer different wood pellet supply solutions, depending on volumes, logistical constraints, and distribution methods.
home.products_subtext: Products are selected from suppliers with recognized certifications such as ENplus A1 or DINplus, depending on availability.
home.commit_text_1: We select our suppliers based on straightforward criteria: product quality, consistency of information, available traceability, and logistical reliability.
home.commit_text_2: Our approach favors structured and actionable offers, allowing our clients to make quick decisions with a clear and sufficient level of information.
home.final_cta_text: Our team is at your disposal to study your needs and propose a suitable solution.

products.meta_title: Our wood pellet solutions – SMP France
products.meta_desc: Discover our wood pellet supply offers for professionals: 15kg bags, big bags, and bulk. Quick quotes.
products.intro_text_1: SMP France offers wood pellet supply solutions tailored to the needs of professionals, based on volumes, logistical constraints, and distribution methods.
products.intro_text_2: Our approach consists of building coherent offers, combining product quality, availability, and appropriate delivery conditions.
products.format_1_text: Format suited for retail distribution and consumer-facing networks. Standard packaging, easy to store and market.
products.format_2_text: An intermediate solution to handle larger volumes while maintaining certain logistical flexibility.
products.format_3_text: An approach suited for large volumes and circuits requiring optimized transport and storage.
products.cert_text_1: The products we offer are selected from suppliers holding recognized certifications on the European market, notably ENplus A1 and DINplus, depending on availability.
products.cert_text_2: These certifications govern pellet quality, consistency of technical characteristics, and parts of the supply chain.
products.source_title: Structured sourcing with a priority on the French market
products.source_text_1: We primarily favor sourcing from the French market to ensure better logistics control, proximity to delivery points, and flow regularity.
products.source_text_2: Furthermore, we also work with European suppliers, particularly for optimization purposes, to offer competitive options tailored to the specific constraints of each delivery zone.
products.source_text_3: Each supply chain is thus constructed according to availability, market conditions, and the client's operational requirements.
products.method_title: An approach based on offer coherence
products.method_text_1: We do not solely focus on price, but on a combination of elements that guarantee an actionable offer: product quality, certification, packaging, available documentation, delivery capacity, and supplier reliability.
products.method_text_2: This approach reduces uncertainties and provides better clarity in proposals.
products.form_success: Your request has been successfully sent. We will get back to you shortly with a suitable proposal.
products.final_cta_text: Need specific support? We review each request based on volumes, logistical constraints, and delivery zones.
products.quick_contact_text: Need a quick answer? Contact us directly by phone.

support.title: Dedicated Support
support.text: Professional advice according to your needs

standards.title: Pellets selected according to recognized standards
standards.item4: limited fines rate to preserve combustion quality
standards.item5: controlled density for more consistent combustion
standards.item6: standardized diameter to ensure better device compatibility

contact.meta_desc: Contact the SMP France team for your professional wood pellet supply needs.
contact.intro_text: Our team is available to examine your needs and propose a tailored solution depending on quantities, logistical constraints, and delivery area.
contact.zone_text_1: We mainly operate in France, Belgium, and Switzerland.
contact.zone_text_2: Thanks to our experience and control over supply chains, we are also able to operate on a European scale, both for sourcing and delivery, based on the specific project requirements.
contact.form_success: Your message has been successfully sent. We will get back to you as soon as possible.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.content_1: SMP France takes your data privacy very seriously. This privacy policy describes what information we collect, how we use it, and how we protect it.
privacy.collect_text: We collect information when you submit a quote or contact request (name, company, email, phone).
privacy.use_text: The information we collect is used exclusively to respond to your requests, propose B2B commercial offers, and improve customer service.
privacy.protect_text: We implement security measures to maintain the safety of your personal information. Your data is never sold or traded with third parties.

engagement.meta_desc: Discover our commitments to quality, traceability, and reliability for professional wood pellet supply.
engagement.intro_p1: At SMP France, we place particular importance on product quality, supply traceability, and the practices of our partners.
engagement.intro_p2: As part of our trading activity, our role is to select suppliers capable of offering reliable, documented pellets tailored to the constraints of the professional market.
engagement.section_1_p1: The pellets offered come from suppliers with recognized quality references in the European market, specifically ENplus A1 and DINplus, depending on availability.
engagement.section_1_p2: These standards govern product quality, consistency of technical characteristics, and parts of the supply chain.
engagement.section_1_p3: We ensure consistency between the product offered, its packaging, and associated information.
engagement.section_2_p1: We pay close attention to the origin of raw materials as well as the information available about the products.
engagement.section_2_p2: Traceability is a central element in our evaluation of offers, particularly to ensure consistency between the product, its certification, and its logistical circuit.
engagement.section_2_p3: When forest management certifications such as FSC or PEFC are associated with a supplier or a range, they constitute an additional element of assessment.
engagement.section_3_p1: Our selection is not based solely on price, but on a set of criteria ensuring a consistent and actionable offer:
engagement.section_3_p2: We also incorporate elements related to supplier practices, favoring players who respect recognized standards in terms of production conditions.
engagement.section_4_p1: We work with partners capable of meeting professional constraints in terms of volumes, deadlines, and delivery.
engagement.section_4_li3: consistency between commercial commitments and operational capacities
engagement.section_5_p1: We strive to structure product information in a clear and actionable way to facilitate its use in our clients' processes.
engagement.section_5_p2: Each offer is built with a sufficient level of information, including in particular:
engagement.conclusion_text: Our approach aims to provide readable, consistent offers adapted to the constraints of the professional market, integrating requirements for quality, traceability, and operational reliability.

faq.meta_title: FAQ – Wood Pellet Supply | SMP France
faq.meta_desc: Find answers to frequently asked questions about wood pellet supply, quality, and logistics.
faq.title: FAQ — Wood Pellet Supply
faq.q1: How can I guarantee the quality of the pellets resold to my clients?
faq.a1_1: We work with suppliers offering ENplus A1 or DINplus certified pellets according to availability. These standards cover calorific value, ash content, moisture content, and product regularity.
faq.a1_2: Each offer is accompanied by available documents and information to ensure better traceability and consistency between the proposed product, its packaging, and the announced characteristics.
faq.q2: How can I limit the risk of stockouts during the season?
faq.a2_1: We prioritize supply organization that allows us to anticipate seasonal needs and secure volumes as early as possible.
faq.a2_2: Depending on projects and volumes, scheduled supply solutions can be implemented to facilitate stock management and ensure better continuity of deliveries during the high season.
faq.q3: What delivery methods do you offer?
faq.a3_1: We offer different logistics solutions based on client needs and constraints:
faq.a3_2: Deliveries can be organized to a warehouse, a construction site, or directly to the final customer depending on the chosen configurations.
faq.q4: How do you manage market price volatility?
faq.a4_1: The wood pellet market can evolve strongly depending on the season, availability, and supply conditions.
faq.a4_2: Our role is to build consistent and readable offers, allowing our clients to have better visibility on their costs and supplies.
faq.a4_3: Depending on needs, contractual or programmed approaches can be studied to secure purchasing conditions over a given period.
faq.q5: What is the minimum volume to work with you?
faq.a5_1: We adapt our proposed solutions based on the needs, volumes, and profile of the client.
faq.a5_2: This can range from occasional orders to regular supplies on larger volumes.
faq.a6_1: Delivery times can vary depending on the time of year, requested volumes, and the delivery zone.
faq.a6_2: Our organization aims to ensure regular flows and consistent planning of deliveries to limit operational constraints for our clients.

values.meta_desc: Discover SMP France's values: human relationships, professional excellence, and a responsible approach to energy.
values.title: Our values
values.intro_p: At SMP France, we believe that supply quality is not just about the product itself, but also about relationship reliability, operational rigor, and the responsibility associated with our business. Our approach is built around three principles: human focus, professional requirements, and a responsible vision of energy.
values.human_p1: Behind every delivery, there are teams, partners, clients, and concrete operational constraints. We prioritize long-term relationships based on trust, responsiveness, and clear communication.
values.human_conclusion: Our goal is to build long-lasting and consistent relationships with all our partners.
values.human_quote: We grow with our partners. Your success is our success!
values.excellence_p1: Distributing wood pellets is not just about delivering a product, but about guaranteeing a reliable and usable solution for the final customer. We pay special attention to:
values.excellence_li1: the quality of the proposed pellets
values.excellence_li2: the consistency of the information transmitted
values.excellence_p2: Proposed products come from suppliers with recognized quality references, notably ENplus A1 and DINplus depending on availability. Our approach aims to limit uncertainties and provide more visibility to our partners.
values.responsibility_p1: Wood pellets are part of a logic of valuing wood industry by-products and search for energy efficiency. We prioritize consistent supplies in terms of quality, traceability, and logistics, with attention paid to:
values.responsibility_p2: Quality pellets also contribute to improving device performance, limiting fouling, and optimizing energy consumption. Our approach aims to reconcile performance, economic consistency, and responsible use of resources.
values.vision_p: Building reliable offers, working in the long term, and proposing consistent solutions: this is the vision that guides our daily activity.
values.reliable_p: We prioritize long-term relationships, clear communication, and followed commitments.
values.responsible_p: We pay special attention to product quality, traceability, and logistics consistency.
values.committed_p: We strive to offer solutions adapted to the needs of the professional market, with an approach turned towards regularity and performance over time.
